falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above $10,500 (resistance level) on 3 consecutive days within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a definitive upward trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average by at least 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly opposing the current HOLD and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 65 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would confirm a high-probability blowoff top, contradicting the current HOLD and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
